title: When is a factory reset reasonable?
diagnostic_questions: Did you back up photos and contacts?
solutions: Try safe mode to rule out apps
Reset network settings before full reset if network-only issue
notes: Factory reset erases user data on phone; on PC use recovery options carefully.

title: Should I replace thermal paste myself?
diagnostic_questions: Are you comfortable opening chassis and grounding yourself?
solutions: If repasting, follow ESD safety and manufacturer guides
Consider technician for liquid metal systems
notes: Liquid metal laptops need expert handling.

title: Are third-party chargers safe?
diagnostic_questions: Does the charger have proper certifications for your region?
solutions: Prefer reputable brands with overcurrent protection
notes: Stop using any charger that overheats.

title: Back up before repair
notes: Repairs can erase storage; assume data loss risk.

title: When to stop DIY
notes: Your safety matters more than finishing a DIY fix.
